text:
Created attachment 231767
v1 (apply via "git am")

Proposing for /quarterly due to " compatibility with the 2021 Quake re-release".

Builds fine with default and inversed options. "Single player" works fine on 12.2/13.0 amd64 with SDL_VIDEODRIVER={x11,wayland}. I don't use/play this port otherwise.
